ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data point */,
  "age_category" TEXT /* Age category of the demographic data (e.g., 50 to 64 years) */,
  "income_category" TEXT /* Income category of the demographic data (e.g., <= 200% of Poverty) */,
  "race_category" TEXT /* Race category of the demographic data (e.g., All Races) */,
  "sex_category" TEXT /* Sex category of the demographic data (e.g., Female Only) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the demographic data was collected */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the state or region */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state or region */,
  "population_total" INTEGER /* Total population in the demographic category */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the region */,
  "urban_rural_indicator" TEXT /* Indicator to classify the region as urban or rural */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the demographic category */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the population */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status (e.g., employed, unemployed, retired) */,
  "language_spoken" TEXT /* Primary language spoken in the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state or region */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state or region */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Code for the state or region (e.g., AL for Alabama) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the state belongs (e.g., Northeast, Midwest) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_coverage" (
  "insurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance coverage data point */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic data point */,
  "uninsured_number" INTEGER /* Number of uninsured individuals */,
  "uninsured_moe" REAL /* Margin of error for the uninsured number */,
  "uninsured_percent" REAL /* Percentage of uninsured individuals */,
  "uninsured_percent_moe" REAL /* Margin of error for the uninsured percentage */,
  "insured_number" INTEGER /* Number of insured individuals */,
  "insured_moe" REAL /* Margin of error for the insured number */,
  "insured_percent" REAL /* Percentage of insured individuals */,
  "insured_percent_moe" REAL /* Margin of error for the insured percentage */,
  "coverage_type" TEXT /* Type of insurance coverage (e.g., Medicare, Medicaid, Private) */,
  "source_of_data" TEXT /* Source of the insurance data (e.g., government report, survey) */,
  "coverage_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the insurance coverage period */,
  "coverage_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the insurance coverage period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insurance_coverage_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_categories" (
  "age_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age category */,
  "age_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the age category (e.g., 50 to 64 years) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_categories" (
  "income_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income category */,
  "income_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the income category (e.g., <= 200% of Poverty) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
